conversations.content: How much did I spend on shopping today?

<function_thought>
To determine how much Emma Johnson spent on shopping today, the first step is to find the current date. I will use the `get_current_day` tool to accomplish this, as it will provide the necessary context for checking her order history for today. Once I have the current date, I can check her order history to find any transactions made today to calculate the total spending.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
Now that I've retrieved the current date as 2024-05-19, the next step is to view Emma Johnson's order history to see any purchases made on this date. This will allow me to calculate how much she spent shopping today.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
Emma Johnson has made two orders today, on 2024-05-19:
1. Portable SSD 1TB
2. SpeedStep Running Shoes

To determine her total spending today, I need to obtain the invoice for these orders to find out how much she spent on each. I'll start by retrieving the invoices for both orders, using their respective order IDs.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-112543"), get_invoice(order_id="ORDER-113219")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
The invoice has been sent to your email inbox.
The invoice has been sent to your email inbox.

<function_thought>
I retrieved the invoices for both today's orders, but the details are sent to Emma's email inbox instead of being displayed here. Therefore, I cannot summarize the expenses directly. However, it is confirmed that the invoices are available, and she can check her email for the spending details.
</function_thought>

<final_answer>
Emma Johnson has made purchases today, on 2024-05-19. The invoices with the spending details have been sent to your email inbox. Please check your email to view how much you spent today.
</final_answer>
